commands.programDescription: Collect and analyse Claude Code usage statistics
commands.reportProject: Filter to a specific project path
commands.reportRepo: Filter to a specific git remote URL (e.g. https://github.com/org/repo)
commands.reportAccount: Filter to a specific account UUID (use 'list' to see known accounts)
commands.reportPeriod: Time period: day, week, month, or all (default: all)
commands.reportDetail: Show per-session listing instead of aggregate
commands.reportTrend: Show usage broken down by time period instead of aggregate
commands.reportSession: Show detailed view of a single session
commands.reportHtml: Write a self-contained HTML report to a file
commands.status: Show database size, row counts, and last collection time
commands.export: Export data to CSV or JSON
commands.exportFormat: Output format: csv or json (default: json)
commands.exportProject: Filter to a specific project path
commands.exportPeriod: Time period: day, week, month, or all
commands.diagnose: Show schema fingerprint diffs, quarantined lines, and version changes
commands.searchProject: Filter to a specific project path
commands.tagRemove: Remove the specified tags instead of adding
commands.tags: List all tags with session counts
commands.backfill: Re-parse all session files to backfill new fields (e.g. prompt_text)
commands.serveOpen: Open in default browser after starting
commands.spending: Token spending breakdown — where did my tokens go?
commands.spendingPeriod: Time range: day, week, month, all (default: day)
commands.spendingTop: Number of top items to show (default: 5)
commands.spendingSort: Sort order: cost, tokens, prompts (default: cost)

collection.done: Done. {{filesProcessed}} files processed, {{filesSkipped}} skipped, {{sessionsUpserted}} sessions upserted, {{messagesUpserted}} messages upserted.
collection.doneWithAccounts: Done. {{filesProcessed}} files processed, {{filesSkipped}} skipped, {{sessionsUpserted}} sessions upserted, {{messagesUpserted}} messages upserted, {{accountsMatched}} accounts matched from telemetry.
collection.parseErrors: ⚠  {{count}} parse errors quarantined — run 'diagnose' for details.

report.noSessionsFiltered: No sessions found for the given filters.
report.noMessages: No messages recorded for this session.
report.planValueUsed: Plan: {{planFee}}/mo → {{percent}}% of plan value used this period

config.unknownKey: Unknown config key: {{key}}. Valid keys: cost.day, cost.week, cost.month
config.invalidValue: Invalid value: {{value}}. Must be a non-negative number.
config.unknownAction: Unknown action: {{action}}. Use set, show, or unset.

tag.noTagsSpecified: No tags specified. Provide one or more tags to add/remove.

backfill.resetCheckpoints: Reset {{count}} file checkpoints. Running full re-collection...
backfill.complete: Backfill complete. {{filesProcessed}} files re-processed, {{messagesUpserted}} messages updated.

serve.portInUse: Error: port {{port}} is already in use
